title: E-commerce Support Team
description: Complete customer support solution with order tracking, refunds, and product inquiries
preview: Handles customer questions about orders, processes refunds, and provides product recommendations

Customer Support Agent.role: First-line customer support for general inquiries
Customer Support Agent.description: Handles greeting customers, answering FAQs, and routing complex issues to specialized agents

Order Management Agent.description: Tracks orders, updates shipping information, handles delivery issues

Refund Specialist.description: Processes refund requests, explains return policies, handles exchanges

title: Data Analysis Team
description: SQL expert, data visualizer, and insights reporter working together
preview: Analyzes data, creates visualizations, and generates actionable business insights

SQL Expert.description: Writes optimized SQL queries, explains query logic, handles complex joins and aggregations

Visualization Specialist.description: Creates charts, dashboards, and visual reports that tell compelling data stories

Insights Reporter.description: Translates data findings into actionable business recommendations

title: Content Creation Studio
description: Copywriter, SEO specialist, and social media manager for complete content workflow
preview: Creates SEO-optimized content, writes engaging copy, and manages social media presence

Copywriter.description: Writes engaging blog posts, articles, and marketing copy with compelling narratives

SEO Specialist.description: Optimizes content for search engines, researches keywords, improves rankings

Social Media Manager.description: Creates platform-specific social content, manages posting schedules, engages audiences

title: Developer Support Team
description: Technical support specialists for developer tools and APIs
preview: Helps developers debug code, understand APIs, and implement integrations

API Documentation Agent.description: Explains API endpoints, provides code examples, clarifies authentication flows

Debugging Assistant.description: Analyzes error messages, suggests fixes, explains debugging strategies

Integration Guide.description: Helps developers integrate third-party services, SDKs, and APIs into their applications

title: HR & Recruiting Team
description: Job description writer, candidate screener, and interview coordinator
preview: Streamlines hiring process from job posting to candidate screening

Job Description Writer.description: Writes clear, attractive job descriptions that attract the right candidates

Candidate Screener.description: Reviews resumes, screens candidates, identifies best fits for positions

Interview Coordinator.description: Schedules interviews, communicates with candidates, manages interview logistics

title: Personal Finance Advisory
description: Budget planner, investment advisor, and expense tracker for financial wellness
preview: Helps users manage budgets, plan investments, and track expenses

Budget Planner.description: Creates personalized budgets, tracks spending categories, suggests savings strategies

Investment Advisor.description: Provides investment education, explains options, discusses risk tolerance
Investment Advisor.disclaimer: Provides educational information only, not financial advice

Expense Tracker.description: Helps categorize expenses, identifies spending patterns, suggests cost-cutting opportunities

title: Virtual Tutoring Team
description: Subject tutors specializing in math, science, and writing
preview: Provides personalized tutoring across multiple subjects with adaptive teaching

Math Tutor.description: Explains math concepts, solves problems step-by-step, adapts to student level

Science Tutor.description: Teaches biology, chemistry, and physics concepts with real-world examples

Writing Coach.description: Helps with essays, grammar, structure, and creative writing development

title: Restaurant Operations
description: Reservation manager, menu consultant, and customer feedback handler
preview: Manages reservations, optimizes menus, and handles customer feedback

Reservation Manager.description: Handles reservations, manages waitlists, optimizes table assignments

Menu Consultant.description: Analyzes menu performance, suggests improvements, considers food trends

Feedback Handler.description: Analyzes reviews, addresses complaints, identifies service improvements

title: Agencja TikTok/Reels/LinkedIn 2026
description: Kompletny zespół do tworzenia wiralowych treści wideo i budowania marki osobistej.
preview: Generuje scenariusze, analizuje trendy i pisze posty na LinkedIn.

Viral Scriptwriter.description: Tworzy angażujące scenariusze do TikTok/Reels z mocnymi hookami.

Trend Analyst.description: Monitoruje trendy, dobiera muzykę i formaty wideo.

LinkedIn Ghostwriter.description: Pisze profesjonalne posty na LinkedIn budujące autorytet.

title: Edukator online – kursy + Discord
description: Zespół do tworzenia, sprzedaży i obsługi kursów online oraz społeczności.
preview: Projektuje kursy, zarządza społecznością i automatyzuje sprzedaż.

Course Architect.description: Strukturyzuje wiedzę w logiczne moduły i lekcje.

Community Manager.description: Angażuje kursantów, moderuje dyskusje i zbiera feedback.

Funnel Specialist.description: Tworzy sekwencje mailowe sprzedające i onboardujące kursantów.

title: Freelance Copywriter PL
description: Wsparcie w researchu, pisaniu i korekcie tekstów po polsku.
preview: Przeprowadza research, pisze artykuły i optymalizuje pod SEO.

Research Specialist.description: Wyszukuje wiarygodne źródła, statystyki i fakty do tekstów.

PL Copywriter.description: Pisze angażujące teksty w języku polskim dopasowane do grupy docelowej.

SEO Editor.description: Poprawia błędy językowe i optymalizuje tekst pod wyszukiwarki.
